fields.title: agent: worker doesn't have agent tool - cannot spawn nested agents
fields.description: Worker agents don't have the agent tool available, so they can't spawn nested agents. Since we have maxDepth limit, nested spawning should be allowed up to that depth.
fields.close_reason: Fixed: Workers now receive agent tool via customTools. Created shared runtime (runtime.ts) and tool factory (tool.ts) to allow nested spawning.
